---
title: "Sandbox — quiz engine (internal)"
subtitle: "Not learner content. Proves the quiz.yml -> shortcode -> client-side scoring path."
search: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
**Internal scratch page** proving the quiz engine (P0-D6 / DECISIONS D0006): a
`quiz.yml` rendered by the quiz shortcode into a client-side MCQ that scores in
the browser and stores the best score in `localStorage`. The quiz file is
schema-checked in CI by `infra/ci/quiz_lint.py`. Pick answers and press
**Check answers** in a browser to see scoring + persistence.
:::

The quiz below is authored as `quiz-sandbox.yml` and mounted with one line:
{{</* quiz quiz-sandbox.yml */>}}

{{< quiz quiz-sandbox.yml >}}

Reload the page after submitting: your best score is read back from
`localStorage`.
